title: Create ApprovalFlows Filament resource under System Management
acceptance_criteria: ApprovalFlows resource created under System Management navigation group
List page shows table with: name, model_type (badge), step count, created_at
Create page has fields: name, description, model_type (select), steps repeater
Steps repeater includes: role select dropdown (from Spatie roles), auto-generated step_order
Edit page mirrors Create page layout
Follows existing pattern: Resources/ApprovalFlows/ with Pages/, Tables/, Schemas/ structure
Navigation group matches existing DashboardPanelProvider configuration
Validation: name required, model_type required, at least one step required
